song.title: My God is so Big!
song.lyrics:
[V1] My God is so big, so strong and so mighty There's nothing my God cannot do. My God is so big, so strong and so mighty There's nothing my God cannot do.
[C] The mountains are His, The valleys are His, The stars are His handiwork too. My God is so big, so strong and so mighty There's nothing my God cannot do.
